action.description: Action shots showing students engaged in activities, demonstrating that the League is fun and active.

cards.description: Adornments for classes on the website. Fairly generic representations of a class or program.

classes.description: Images specific to individual classes, not the whole category but particular courses.

github.description: Screenshots for websites or instructions describing how to use GitHub. Many are images of particular features of the GitHub website.

logos.description: Logos for The League. Use these anywhere logos are required.

memes.description: Meme images used in class where students program overlaying text over images to make memes.

microbit.description: Images for websites, instructions, and classes describing how to use the micro:bit MakeCode site.

mkt.description: Marketing photos. These tend to be vetted as most useful, so they are high quality and used frequently.

module-navigation.description: Module navigation images for a particular class, specifically the Java curriculum using CodeSpaces Motors.

motors.description: Images for the Motors clinic. These may be deprecated as content has been moved into the Motors website.

p3logos.description: Third-party partner logos (P3 = third party), such as GitHub, Facebook, or other organizations.

python.description: Images used in the Python curriculum.

robots.description: Pictures of Cutebots, robots, and other kinds of robots. Use anytime robot pictures are needed.

vscode.description: Small images of VS Code features for instructions on how to use VS Code.
